styleEdits.description: Focus on what remains rather than what is lost. Build an outfit around the sturdy basics that have never let you down. A classic pair of trousers or a reliable coat proves that some things endure. Find stability in the permanent fixtures of your wardrobe.

styleEdits.description: Generosity is a theme so perhaps wear something that was given to you as a gift. It wraps you in the intention of the giver. Alternatively treat your outfit as a gift to the world by adding a flower or a beautiful colour that brightens someone else's day.

styleEdits.description: Success leaves clues so dress like you have already made it. Immaculate tailoring, high-quality accessories, and a confident silhouette command the room. You don't need to shout to be heard. Let the quality of your clothes speak for your achievements.

styleEdits.title: The Cornerstone
styleEdits.description: Be the rock. Choose heavy, substantial fabrics that give you a physical presence. A structured coat or a heavy knit adds gravity to your look. People look to you for stability so ensure your outfit looks unshakable.

styleEdits.title: The Epicurean
styleEdits.description: Treat yourself like the main course. Wear the velvet, the silk, or the gold because life is too short for scratchy fabrics. It is a day to appreciate material wealth and physical pleasure. Stop saving the "good clothes" for a special occasion because today is the occasion.
